zh.Church Minshull, Cheshire, England: 英國爾邱奇 明書爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Dutton於1369年出生在英國英格蘭爾哈頓時，他的父親Edmund Dutton27歲，母親Joan Minshull27歲。他於大約1397年與Parnall Petronill De Vernon在英國爾哈頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年4月7日在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾瓦維頓。

zh-hans.Church Minshull, Cheshire, England: 英国爾邱奇 明書爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Dutton于1369年出生在英国英格兰爾哈頓时，他的父亲Edmund Dutton27岁，母亲Joan Minshull27岁。他于大约1397年与Parnall Petronill De Vernon在英国爾哈頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年4月7日在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾瓦維頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Dutton was born in 1369, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edmund Dutton, was 27 and his mother, Joan Minshull, was 27. He married Parnall Petronill De Vernon about 1397, in Hatton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 April 1440, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Dutton est né en 1369, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Dutton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Minshull, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Parnall Petronill De Vernon environ 1397, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 avril 1440, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Waverton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Dutton 1369 in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Dutton 27 und seine Mutter Joan Minshull 27. Er hat um 1397 in Hatton, Cheshire, England Parnall Petronill De Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. April 1440 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Waverton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Dutton è nato il nel 1369 nel Hatton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edmund Dutton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan Minshull, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Parnall Petronill De Vernon circa 1397, nel Hatton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 aprile 1440, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Waverton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Duttonが1369年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Edmund Duttonは27歳，母Joan Minshullは27歳であった。約1397年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンでParnall Petronill De Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年4月7日に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Dutton(이)가 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Dutton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Minshull(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1397년 영국 체실르 해턴에서 Parnall Petronill De Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 4월 7일 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 와버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Dutton nasceu em 1369, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Dutton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Minshull, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Parnall Petronill De Vernon aproximadamente 1397, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de abril de 1440, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Dutton родился в 1369 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edmund Dutton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Minshull, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Parnall Petronill De Vernon около 1397 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 апреля 1440 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности вавиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Dutton nació en 1369, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edmund Dutton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Minshull, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Parnall Petronill De Vernon aproximadamente 1397, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de abril de 1440, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Waverton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
